Off Calendar Jan-05-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearance:
Patrick R. Co, Esq., for Pauley Construction, Inc., Defendant/Moving Party

Tentative Ruling adopted: Defendant Pauley Construction, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Deposition Of Cross-Complainant Adelphia Communications's Person Most Knowledgeable re: Contract With Pauley Construction, Inc. is granted. The deposition of an individual and the deposition of a corporation's person most knowledgeable are not subsequent depositions under C.C.P. Section 2025.610. The corporation who is producing the person most knowledgeable is the sole entity entitled to name a person most knowledgeable, and the party noticing such a deposition is not presumed to know who will be designated the voice of the corporation for the purposes of the deposition. Pauley Construction has not designated and cannot designate Mr. Zornes as Adelphia's person most knowledgeable. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
